roomTypes.roomTypeDesc:
32 sq. m., rain shower, pillow menu, king-sized bed, luxury bath amenities, work desk, mini bar, WiFi, 32-inch LCD

Relax in this King Bed Guest Room which features one king-sized bed. Select the pillow of your choice from our convenient pillow menu. Settle in and enjoy your favorite shows on the 32-inch LCD TV. With in-room WiFi, you will be able to browse the internet and stay up-to-date on business.

Freshen up in the open-concept marble bathroom which features a separate walk-in rain shower and bathroom essentials. Start each morning with a cup of coffee in the comfort of your room. Special touches include bathrobes, slippers and a settee against the window.
roomTypes.name: King Guest Room

roomTypes.roomTypeDesc:
32 sq. m., rain shower, pillow menu, king-sized bed, luxury bath amenities, work desk, mini fridge, Wi-Fi, 32-inch LCD TV

Unwind in our King Deluxe Room, designed for comfort and convenience. Sink into 250-thread count sheets on a plush king-sized bed complete with a pillow menu to suit your preference. Stay connected with Wi-Fi, a 32-inch LCD TV and a work desk with an ergonomic chair.

Refresh in the open-concept marble bathroom featuring a walk-in rain shower, luxury bath amenities, bathrobes and slippers. Enjoy thoughtful touches like a mini fridge, coffee maker and complimentary beverages. With 24-hour housekeeping and secure double-locking doors, your stay is both relaxing and seamless. Sleeps up to 3 guests.
roomTypes.name: King Deluxe Room

roomTypes.roomTypeDesc:
32 sq. m., mountain view, rain shower, pillow menu, king-sized bed, luxury bath amenities, work desk, mini fridge, Wi-Fi, 32-inch LCD TV

Unwind in our King Deluxe Mountain View Room, offering a picturesque view of the mountain range. Sink into 250-thread count sheets on a plush king-sized bed complete with a pillow menu to suit your preference. Stay connected with Wi-Fi, a 32-inch LCD TV and a work desk with an ergonomic chair.

Refresh in the open-concept marble bathroom featuring a walk-in rain shower, Crabtree & Evelyn bath amenities, bathrobes and slippers. Enjoy thoughtful touches like a mini fridge, coffee maker and complimentary beverages. With 24-hour housekeeping and secure double-locking doors, your stay is both relaxing and seamless. Sleeps up to 3 guests.
roomTypes.name: King Deluxe Room Mountain View

thumbnail.altText: Large Bed in a Guest Room with TV, Desk Sofa and City View

roomTypes.roomTypeName: King Deluxe Suite W/ Lounge Access
roomTypes.roomTypeDesc:
50 sq. m., Executive Lounge access, bathtub, king-sized bed, luxury bath amenities, work desk, mini fridge, WiFi, 32-inch LCD TV

Experience extra space and a gorgeous view of the city skyline in our King Deluxe Suite, complete with Executive Lounge access for exclusive breakfast, evening cocktails and a private space to unwind.

Sink into 250-thread count sheets on a plush king-sized bed complete with a pillow menu to suit your preference. Refresh in the spacious bathroom featuring a separate bathtub and shower, luxury bath amenities, bathrobes and slippers. Stay productive with Wi-Fi, a work desk with an ergonomic chair and desk-level electrical plugs, or unwind with your favorite shows on a 32-inch LCD TV. Enjoy added conveniences like a minibar, coffee maker and complimentary beverages, all within a thoughtfully designed space. With 24-hour housekeeping and secure double-locking doors, your stay is both relaxing and seamless. Sleeps up to 3 guests.
roomTypes.name: King Deluxe Suite W/ Lounge Access

roomTypes.roomTypeName: King Executive Room W/ Lounge Access
roomTypes.roomTypeDesc:
32 sq. m., Executive Lounge access, mountain view, rain shower, pillow menu, king-sized bed, luxury bath amenities, work desk, mini fridge, Wi-Fi, 32-inch LCD TV

Unwind in our King Executive Mountain View Room, offering a picturesque view of the mountain range and exclusive Executive Lounge access for breakfast, evening cocktails and a private space to unwind.

Sink into 250-thread count sheets on a plush king-sized bed complete with a pillow menu to suit your preference. Stay connected with Wi-Fi, a 32-inch LCD TV and a work desk with an ergonomic chair. Refresh in the open-concept marble bathroom featuring a walk-in rain shower, luxury bath amenities, bathrobes and slippers. Enjoy thoughtful touches like a mini fridge, coffee maker and complimentary beverages. With 24-hour housekeeping and secure double-locking doors, your stay is both relaxing and seamless. Sleeps up to 3 guests.
roomTypes.name: King Executive Room W/ Lounge Access

roomTypes.roomTypeName: King Terrace Suite W/ Klcc View
roomTypes.roomTypeDesc:
111 sq. m., private terrace, high floor, Executive Lounge access, king-sized bed, KLCC view, luxury bath amenities, work desk, mini bar, Wi-Fi, 32-inch LCD TV, 55-inch flat panel TV, marble-furnished bathroom

Unwind in the King Bed Terrace Suite, where stunning KLCC views and a private terrace from the highest floors of our hotel invite you to savor a freshly brewed coffee from the coffee maker.

Relax in a king-sized bed with 250-thread count sheets and refresh in the marble-furnished bathroom featuring a separate bathtub and shower, luxury bath amenities, bathrobes and slippers. The suite includes a spacious living area, Wi-Fi and entertainment on both a 32-inch LCD TV and a 55-inch flat panel TV.

Enjoy Executive Lounge access with exclusive breakfast and evening refreshments, or start your day at Makan Kitchen with a spread of Asian and international flavors. Thoughtfully designed for relaxation and elevated comfort, this suite is ideal for newlyweds, honeymooners and those seeking an unforgettable stay. With 24-hour housekeeping and secure double-locking doors, it will be both relaxing and seamless. Sleeps up to 3 guests.
roomTypes.name: King Terrace Suite W/ Klcc View

roomTypes.roomTypeName: King Executive Suite W/ Lounge Access
roomTypes.roomTypeDesc:
62 sq. m./667 sq. ft., Executive Lounge access, pantry, living area, king-sized bed, luxury bath amenities, work desk, mini fridge, Wi-Fi, 32-inch LCD TV, 55-inch flat panel TV, connecting rooms

Designed for both business and leisure travelers, our spacious King Executive Suite offers a comfortable living area, pantry and exclusive access to the Executive Lounge where you can enjoy breakfast and evening cocktails.

Perfect for families, this suite accommodates up to 3 guests and connects to a 2 Twin Beds Guest Room, creating a shared space for up to 4 adults and 3 children when booked together. Relax with your favorite shows on the 32-inch LCD TV and 55-inch flat-panel TV, refresh in the bathroom with a separate bathtub and shower, and unwind with thoughtful touches like a pillow menu, bathrobes and slippers. With 24-hour housekeeping and secure double-locking doors, your stay is both relaxing and seamless.
roomTypes.name: King Executive Suite W/ Lounge Access

roomTypes.roomTypeDesc:
This accessible room features one king bed and a roll-in shower.

Feel at home in a stylish and comfortable Accessible Guest Room which features wheelchair-friendly bathroom access and a visual alarm system. Enjoy a great night's sleep in our luxurious Sweet Dreams™ Beds and stay connected with high-speed internet access (fee applies). This Accessible Room also features a raised vanity area, ample safety bars and extra space for wheelchairs. Don't hesitate to contact our friendly team members to help ensure that your stay is as perfect as possible.

Any corresponding photo may not reflect the specific accessible room type or room feature.
roomTypes.name: King Accessible Room

roomTypes.roomTypeDesc:
32 sq. m., rain shower, pillow menu, twin bed, luxury bath amenities, work desk, Mini bar, WiFi, 42-inch LCD

Stay connected in this Two Twin Beds Guest Room. This room offers ample space to work with a desk, adjustable chair, WiFi and an internet cable. International adapters are available for the convenience of global travelers. Choose a pillow from our pillow menu and settle in for a restful night?s sleep in the two twin-sized beds.

Start each morning with a cup of coffee in the comfort of your room. The open-concept bathroom features a marble vanity top, separate walk-in rain shower, bathrobes, slippers and bathroom essentials.
roomTypes.name: Twin Guest Room

roomTypes.roomTypeDesc:
32 sq. m., rain shower, pillow menu, Twin bed, luxury bath amenities, work desk, mini fridge, Wi-Fi, 32-inch LCD TV, connecting rooms

Unwind in our Twin Deluxe Room designed for both business and leisure travelers. Overlooking the vibrant Kuala Lumpur cityscape, this stylish space features two plush twin beds and a cozy settee by the window. For added space and convenience, connecting rooms are available upon request.

Relax with a pillow of your choice from our pillow menu, refresh in the open-concept marble bathroom with a rain shower and enjoy thoughtful touches like bathrobes, slippers and luxury bath amenities. Stay productive at the work desk with Wi-Fi and an ergonomic chair, or wind down with entertainment on the 32-inch LCD TV. With 24-hour housekeeping and secure double-locking doors, your stay is both relaxing and seamless.
